metadata.description: Skills and plugins for the Al Hamra Tower website — sourced from Anthropic, Vercel, nextlevelbuilder, and bencium

plugins.name: ui-ux-intelligence
plugins.description: UI/UX Pro Max: 50+ styles, 161 color palettes, 57 font pairings, 99 UX guidelines, 25 chart types across 10 stacks.

plugins.name: ux-design
plugins.description: Bencium's three UX designer modes (controlled/impact/innovative) plus design audit, typography enforcement, and relationship-centric agentic UX design.

plugins.name: ui-styling
plugins.description: shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS + Canvas design system. Accessible components, responsive layouts, dark mode, theming, and 30 OFL fonts.

plugins.name: design-tools
plugins.description: Frontend design guidelines, algorithmic art, and web design audit tools.

plugins.name: architecture-thinking
plugins.description: Renaissance architecture (first-principles), human architect mindset, negentropy/entropy system evaluation, and vanity engineering review.

plugins.name: communication-intelligence
plugins.description: Adaptive communication (intent detection), AEO content optimization for AI search, and code conventions.

plugins.name: react-skills
plugins.description: React/Next.js best practices (64 rules), composition patterns, and React Native guidelines from Vercel Engineering.

plugins.name: document-skills
plugins.description: Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and PDF processing for leasing brochures, investor decks, and floor plan tables.

plugins.name: deployment-skills
plugins.description: Deploy to Vercel via CLI, git push, token-based auth, and environment variable management.

plugins.name: web-skills
plugins.description: Web artifact builder, browser automation testing, and Claude API/SDK reference.
